title: ehrharta rupestris subsp. dodii
intro: Ehrharta rupestris subsp. dodii, also known as dodii, is a type of plant species belonging to the grass family (Poaceae). It is native to New Zealand and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, wounds, and skin infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting healing. Dodii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
